HealthMetrics.description: Read-only raw health metric records for longitudinal physiological analysis.

AiHealthMetrics.description: Read-only health metric records exposed for AI-assisted DataAnalyser exploration.

fields.name: Id
fields.description: Unique health metric record identifier.

fields.name: Provider
fields.description: Data provider or source system that produced the metric.

fields.name: MetricType
fields.description: Primary metric category

fields.name: MetricSubtype
fields.description: More specific subtype or classification of the metric within MetricType.

fields.name: SourceFile
fields.description: Original imported source file associated with the metric record.

fields.name: NormalizedTimestamp
fields.description: Normalized timestamp used by DataAnalyser for chronological analysis and charting.

fields.name: RawTimestamp
fields.description: Original timestamp value as supplied by the source data before normalization.

fields.name: Value
fields.description: Metric value captured for the health measurement. Interpret together with Unit

fields.name: Unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement for Value

fields.name: MetaDataId
fields.description: Identifier linking this metric record to additional metadata

fields.name: CreatedDate
fields.description: Date and time when this record was created or imported into the Health database.

AiHealthMetricProviders.description: Read-only provider distribution across all health metric records.

fields.name: ProviderKey
fields.description: Stable key for Provider, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: Provider
fields.description: Data provider or source system that produced the metric.

fields.name: RecordCount
fields.description: Number of health metric records for this provider.

AiHealthMetricTypes.description: Read-only metric type distribution across all health metric records.

fields.name: MetricTypeKey
fields.description: Stable key for MetricType, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: MetricType
fields.description: Primary metric category.

fields.name: RecordCount
fields.description: Number of health metric records for this metric type.

AiHealthMetricSubtypes.description: Read-only metric subtype distribution across all health metric records.

fields.name: MetricSubtypeKey
fields.description: Stable key for MetricSubtype, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: MetricSubtype
fields.description: More specific metric classification within MetricType.

fields.name: RecordCount
fields.description: Number of health metric records for this metric subtype.

AiHealthMetricUnits.description: Read-only unit distribution across all health metric records.

fields.name: UnitKey
fields.description: Stable key for Unit, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: Unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement for metric values.

fields.name: RecordCount
fields.description: Number of health metric records for this unit.

AiHealthMetricShapeCounts.description: Read-only counts by Provider, MetricType, MetricSubtype, and Unit.

fields.name: ProviderKey
fields.description: Stable key for Provider, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: MetricTypeKey
fields.description: Stable key for MetricType, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: MetricSubtypeKey
fields.description: Stable key for MetricSubtype, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: UnitKey
fields.description: Stable key for Unit, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: Provider
fields.description: Metric provider.

fields.name: MetricType
fields.description: Primary metric category.

fields.name: MetricSubtype
fields.description: More specific metric classification.

fields.name: Unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement.

fields.name: RecordCount
fields.description: Number of health metric records in this shape.

AiHealthMetricDuplicatePatterns.description: Read-only duplicate candidate keys by Provider, MetricType, MetricSubtype, Unit, and NormalizedTimestamp.

fields.name: ProviderKey
fields.description: Stable key for Provider, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: MetricTypeKey
fields.description: Stable key for MetricType, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: MetricSubtypeKey
fields.description: Stable key for MetricSubtype, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: UnitKey
fields.description: Stable key for Unit, preserving null and empty values.

fields.name: NormalizedTimestampKey
fields.description: Stable key for NormalizedTimestamp, preserving null values.

fields.name: Provider
fields.description: Metric provider.

fields.name: MetricType
fields.description: Primary metric category.

fields.name: MetricSubtype
fields.description: More specific metric classification.

fields.name: Unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement.

fields.name: NormalizedTimestamp
fields.description: Normalized timestamp used for chronological analysis.

fields.name: DuplicateCount
fields.description: Number of records sharing the duplicate candidate key.
